name: Leshy
description:
Yo, it’s been a while. Sorry for not posting anything, but I have been a little swamped as of lately, and I’m currently making this at one in the morning, because I can’t sleep a wink. Anyway, I finally was able to decide which Bishop to start out with first, having flipped a coin between Heket and Leshy, as they are the only two I’d think would canonically try eating someone. Is there gonna be other Leshy bots out there? Yes. Will I make bots of the other Bishops? Probably.

Now, it’s been a hot minute since I made a bot, so go easy on me if something is wrong with the bot and just let me know when you notice it so it can be fixed ASAP!
creator: Water_Gecko
